title: selliguea oodes
intro: Selliguea oodes, also known as Polypodium oodes, is a type of fern commonly found in tropical Asia. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Selliguea oodes include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and soothe digestive issues. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve drying the leaves and roots, which can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use.
